ddls:
CREATE TABLE "investment_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the investment strategy */,
  "investment_objective" TEXT /* Primary investment objective (e.g., growth, income, capital preservation) */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance level (e.g., conservative, moderate, aggressive) */,
  "time_horizon" INTEGER /* Time horizon in years */,
  "management_fee" TEXT /* Annual management fee as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_securities" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment strategy */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "weightage" TEXT /* Weightage of the security in the strategy */,
  "position_value" TEXT /* Total value of the security position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id", "security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Index provider (e.g., S&P, Dow Jones) */,
  "index_type" TEXT /* Type of index (e.g., price return, total return) */,
  "market_coverage" TEXT /* Market coverage (e.g., US large cap, emerging markets) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the custom index */,
  "security_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of security IDs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance data */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment strategy */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index */,
  "mean_return" TEXT /* Mean return of the investment strategy */,
  "index_return" TEXT /* Return of the market index */,
  "strategy_wealth" TEXT /* Wealth of the investment strategy */,
  "index_wealth" TEXT /* Wealth of the market index */,
  "excess_return" TEXT /* Excess return of the investment strategy */,
  "sharpe_ratio" TEXT /* Sharpe ratio of the investment strategy */,
  "sortino_ratio" TEXT /* Sortino ratio of the investment strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "strategy_id", "index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk model */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investment strategy */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the risk model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of model parameters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, client) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data (e.g., charts, tables, narratives) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, risk, compliance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, report generation) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_returns" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security */,
  "return_value" TEXT /* Return value for the security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "security_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_returns" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index */,
  "return_value" TEXT /* Return value for the market index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "index_id")
)
